title: Pugs Tetra Retexture
description: A texture pack for the Tetra mod, which gives the block textures a new, more stylized, look.
body:
**Why did I make this?**

When playing Tetra I was quickly impressed by the mod, however I never really liked the ruin's textures. They felt dull and lifeless to me, and they didn't fit the Minecraft feel.

So I decided I would retexture every block in the ruins, and now I have done just that. Giving the ruins much more personality and design!


**What does this pack include?**

Every Tetra ruins related block has been retextured, so every block except the workbench, rack, and seeping bedrock.

This pack does not however retexture any items, menus, models, or sounds.


**Will this pack be kept up to date with Tetra?**

Not guaranteed, but if I have the time I will try to keep the pack up to date.


**Can I use / add this to my modpack?**

Yes, you can add it to your pack!


Screenshots can be found in the gallery tab :)
